title: Responsibility to Seafarers. The Department shall ensure that Overseas
content: 32 Filipino Seafarers are amply protected, and that their interests, well-being and welfare are 33 promoted. LMAs shall be responsible for the faithful compliance by their 34 principals/employers of all obligations under the employment contract. 35 36
